source.name: themepainter.class
source.title: ThemePainter
source.description: This file contains the default themepainter implementation
source.organisation: MIOLO - Miolo Development Team - UNIVATES Centro Universitario
source.legal: CopyLeft (L) 2001-2002 UNIVATES, Lajeado/RS - Brasil Licensed under GPL (see COPYING.TXT or FSF at www.fsf.org for further details)

class.name: ThemePainter
class.description:
The ThemePainter class is responsible for generating a HTML page containing all elements of the MIOLO Theme class or only those in which the customized theme is interested in.
Each theme should provide a subclass of the ThemePainter named '<name>ThemePainter' where <name> represents the theme's name.
Examples: UnivatesThemePainter, SlashThemePainter, PhpNukeThemePainter

function.name: HasMenuOptions
function.description: Determines if any of the theme's menus have at least on option. This function may be used to see if a menu container is to be painted or not.

function.name: GenerateTheme
function.description: This function finally generates the output page which will be send to the client

function.name: GenerateHeader
function.description: This function generates the page's header, containing scripts, styles, meta-tags, page title etc.

function.name: GenerateBody
function.description: This function generates the page's body

function.name: GenerateStyles
function.description: Generate output of CSS styles

function.name: GenerateScripts
function.description: Generate output of client-side scripts

function.name: GenerateMetas
function.description: Generate output of meta information tags

function.name: GenerateTop
function.description: Generate theme heading

function.name: GenerateContent
function.description: Generate theme content area

function.name: GenerateBottom
function.description: Generate theme footer

function.name: GenerateMenuBar
function.description: Generates the menus into a menu container

function.name: GenerateForm
function.description: This function is called from a form to paint itself

function.name: GenerateListing
function.description: This function is called from a listing to paint itself

function.name: GenerateElements
function.description: A helper function, which generates an array of theme elements. This function is called recursively, when an array elements contains another array.

function.name: GenerateBox
function.description: This function is called to generate a single box

function.name: GenerateMenu
function.description: This function is called to generate a menu's option list

function.name: GenerateNavigationBar
function.description: Implementation of a navigation bar

function.name: GenerateTraceStatus
function.description: Internal function used to generate some useful informations for the MIOLO developer

function.name: GenerateOptionList
function.description: Generates an option list which may contain nested option lists itself

function.name: GenerateToString
function.description: Convenience function to capture the output of an element's Generate function as HTML string.
